dct_title_s: To his excellency the Count of Czernichew, Commander in Chief of her Majesty the Empress, of all the Russia's fleet and gallies, Lieutenant General of her armies, one of the Lords of her Admiralty, Ambassador extraordinary and plenipotentiary to his Majesty the King of Great Britain, a Knight of the Order of the White Eagle, and St. Ann &c. &c. &c., this map of the present seat of war, between the Russians, Poles, and Turks is most humbly inscribed by his excellency's most humble and obedt. servt
dct_alternative_sm: Map of the present seat of war, between the Russians, Poles, and Turks
This map of the present seat of war, between the Russians, Poles, and Turks
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scales on map in lower center: "Russian Wersts 90 to a Degree", "French Leagues 25 to a Degree", "British Miles 60 to a Degree".
Also shows parts of Hungary and Poland.
"This map is compiled by A. Dury and P. Bell."
Below decorative title cartouche: J. Caldwal sculp. -- T: W. Tueur invt.
Decorative cartouche features coats of arms, and a battlefield with cannons and soldiers with tents in the distance.
Has note: "To the public: His excellency the Count of Czernichen has been so kind as to communicate to the Publisher some Manuscript and other Maps from which this is extracted."
